        eligible_genders = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        eligible_races = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        eligible_employment_statuses = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        eligible_educations = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        eligible_marital_statuses = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        eligible_religions = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']
        eligible_business_plan_submitted = ['yes', 'no']

        if (self.gender in eligible_genders
            and self.age > 0
            and self.race in eligible_races
            and self.employment_status in eligible_employment_statuses
            and self.education in eligible_educations
            and self.marital_status in eligible_marital_statuses
            and self.religion in eligible_religions
            and self.business_plan_submitted in eligible_business_plan_submitted):
            return True
        else:
            return False
